TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-weaving_abas_ipay3
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: azi e anu yau dawadsu si sanis e pibuRika peninaku si sanisika haw.
S.PHON: az~ri ə anu jau ɮawaɮsu si sanis ə piβuʁika pəninaku si sanisika haw.
S.FORM: azi e anu yau dawadsu si sanis e pibuRika peninaku si sanisika haw.
S.PHON: az~ri ə anu jau ɮawaɮsu si sanis ə piβuʁika pəninaku si sanisika haw.
S.TRANSL: 阿姐,如果你有時間的話,削 ... 砍我的香蕉樹,削樹皮.

TRANSL.notes: Sister, if you have time, bark ... cut my banana trees and bark (them).

S.TRANSL: Sister, if you have time, bark ... cut my banana trees and bark .
可以啊,我們兩個一起做.
Okay, we two can do it together.

S.FORM: a kwa ya nani wanay ka.
S.PHON: a kwa ja nani wanaj ka.
S.FORM: a kwa ya nani wanay ka.
S.PHON: a kwa ja nani wanaj ka.

TRANSL.notes: 好啊,可是(我有客人).

S.TRANSL: 好啊,可是 .

TRANSL.notes: Okay, but (I have guests).

S.TRANSL: Okay, but .

S.FORM: ngidiku tenun nani wanay mRaynguiku smanis buqaRasiku.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku tənun nani wanaj mʁajŋuiku smanis βuqaʁasiku.
S.FORM: ngidiku tenun nani wanay mRaynguiku smanis buqaRasiku.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku tənun nani wanaj mʁajŋuiku smanis βuqaʁasiku.
S.TRANSL: 我想織布,可是我不會削樹皮,我很懶惰.

TRANSL.notes: I want to weave, but I cannot bark (banana trees). I am lazy.

S.TRANSL: I want to weave, but I cannot bark . I am lazy.

S.FORM: niyana qabuqaRasan qanasanta si qawman XXXX mulpun tu usiq peninaan.
S.PHON: nijana qaβuqaʁasan qanasanta si qawman **** murpun tu usiq pəninaan.
S.FORM: niyana qabuqaRasan qanasanta si qawman XXXX mulpun tu usiq peninaan.
S.PHON: nijana qaβuqaʁasan qanasanta si qawman **** murpun tu usiq pəninaan.
S.TRANSL: 不要懶惰,我們慢慢做,一定會做完一根香蕉.

TRANSL.notes: Don't be lazy. If we do it slowly, we can definitely finish (barking) one banana.

S.TRANSL: Don't be lazy. If we do it slowly, we can definitely finish one banana.
我不能做完一根香蕉.

TRANSL.notes: I cannot (finish barking) one banana.

S.TRANSL: I cannot one banana.
我一天做一根香蕉.
I bark one banana tree in one day.
我懶的做.
I am too lazy to work.
慢慢做一定會做完.

TRANSL.notes: We do it slowly, (and we can) definitely finish the job.

S.TRANSL: We do it slowly, definitely finish the job.
好像有人在趕你要快點.
It's like there is someone who is chasing and hurrying you.

S.FORM: nayau saizi nani wanay smanisiku nani matepuq a limaku na mlizatiiku qaya ya.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ri nani wanaj smanisiku nani matəpuq a rimaku na mriz~ratiiku qaja ja.
S.FORM: nayau saizi nani wanay smanisiku nani matepuq a limaku na mlizatiiku qaya ya.
S.PHON: najau saiz~ri nani wanaj smanisiku nani matəpuq a rimaku na mriz~ratiiku qaja ja.
S.TRANSL: 我割香蕉,割到我的手,我不敢做了.

TRANSL.notes: (When) I barked banana trees, my hand was cut. I don't dare to (bark) again.

S.TRANSL: I barked banana trees, my hand was cut. I don't dare to again.

S.FORM: paqanasaypa mlalalazuk saiza snayauan matepuq a lima.
S.PHON: paqanasajpa mrararaz~ruk saiz~ra snajauan matəpuq a rima.
S.FORM: paqanasaypa mlalalazuk saiza snayauan matepuq a lima.
S.PHON: paqanasajpa mrararaz~ruk saiz~ra snajauan matəpuq a rima.
S.TRANSL: 慢慢做,快的話會割的手.

TRANSL.notes: Do it slowly. If (we) do it in a hurry, (our) hands will be cut.

S.TRANSL: Do it slowly. If do it in a hurry, hands will be cut.
我們要趕快.我們太慢了.
We had to hurry up. We were too slow.
我想我們要快一點.
'We have to hurry up,' I thought.

S.FORM: timangu matepuqti limaku na mlizatiiku qaya sanis.
S.PHON: timaŋu matəpuqti rimaku na mriz~ratiiku qaja sanis.
S.FORM: timangu matepuqti limaku na mlizatiiku qaya sanis.
S.PHON: timaŋu matəpuqti rimaku na mriz~ratiiku qaja sanis.
S.TRANSL: 結果我的手被割到了.再也不敢削樹皮了.
It turned out that my hand was cut. I didn't dare to bark banana trees again.
不要說不敢.
Don't flinch.
我們一定要做.
We must manage to do it.
我跟你說要削樹皮.
'Bark the banana trees,' I said to you.

S.FORM: ngidiku tenun nani mRaynguiku smanis sinananam zin na anemku a.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku tənun nani mʁajŋuiku smanis sinananam z~rin na anəmku a.
S.FORM: ngidiku tenun nani mRaynguiku smanis sinananam zin na anemku a.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku tənun nani mʁajŋuiku smanis sinananam z~rin na anəmku a.
S.TRANSL: 我想要織布,可是我想我不能削樹皮.
'I want to weave, but I cannot bark banana trees,' I think.
你這樣什麼時候才會做?
When will you be able to do it?
你說不會,那到底什麼時候才會?
You say you are unable to do it. When will you be able to do it?

S.FORM: nayau mRaynguiku zinku na buqaRastiiku ya.
S.PHON: najau mʁajŋuiku z~rinku na βuqaʁastiiku ja.
S.FORM: nayau mRaynguiku zinku na buqaRastiiku ya.
S.PHON: najau mʁajŋuiku z~rinku na βuqaʁastiiku ja.
S.TRANSL: 我想我不行.我很懶惰.
I think I can't. I am lazy.

S.FORM: si iza smanis nani sukaw buqaRas nayauti ya wawayku.
S.PHON: si iz~ra smanis nani sukaw βuqaʁas najauti ja wawajku.
S.FORM: si iza smanis nani sukaw buqaRas nayauti ya wawayku.
S.PHON: si iz~ra smanis nani sukaw βuqaʁas najauti ja wawajku.
S.TRANSL: 削樹皮的時候,我的動作就是這樣子.

TRANSL.notes: (When it comes to) barking banana trees, I am like that.

S.TRANSL: barking banana trees, I am like that.
懶惰不好,我們一定要勉強做,慢慢就會了.
Being lazy is not good. We must manage to do it, and we'll be skilled gradually.

S.FORM: en nayauti saizi anu amawaR si.
S.PHON: ən najauti saiz~ri anu amawaʁ si.
S.FORM: en nayauti saizi anu amawaR si.
S.PHON: ən najauti saiz~ri anu amawaʁ si.
S.TRANSL: 好啊,以後.
Okay, afterwards

S.FORM: yau dawad si pawRataka smanis si.
S.PHON: jau ɮawaɮ si pawʁataka smanis si.
S.FORM: yau dawad si pawRataka smanis si.
S.PHON: jau ɮawaɮ si pawʁataka smanis si.
S.TRANSL: 有時間的話,勉強去削樹皮.
If I have time, I will manage to bark banana trees.

S.FORM: saqapian na usiq penina si quni zin na anemku qaya ya.
S.PHON: saqapian na usiq pənina si quni z~rin na anəmku qaja ja.
S.FORM: saqapian na usiq penina si quni zin na anemku qaya ya.
S.PHON: saqapian na usiq pənina si quni z~rin na anəmku qaja ja.
S.TRANSL: 我想,一天做一根也可以啊.
Barking one banana tree in one day is acceptable, I think.
我們這樣子,一定會的.
If we do so, we will definitely become skilled.

S.FORM: Raynguiku Raynguiku zinta zinsu haw Raynguti XXXX waliwisu buqaRas.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuiku ʁajŋuiku z~rinta z~rinsu haw ʁajŋuti **** wariwisu βuqaʁas.
S.FORM: Raynguiku Raynguiku zinta zinsu haw Raynguti XXXX waliwisu buqaRas.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuiku ʁajŋuiku z~rinta z~rinsu haw ʁajŋuti **** wariwisu βuqaʁas.
S.TRANSL: 你一直說不會,結果就真的不會,而且也懶的做.
If you keep saying 'I can't, I can't,' you will be incapable and lazy.
我喜歡編織.
I like weaving.
一直做,就一定會做.
If we keep doing, we will be skilled.
我們每天做.
We do it every day.
就會做.

TRANSL.notes: (We) will be skilled.

S.TRANSL: will be skilled.
就不會怕被割到.

TRANSL.notes: (We) won't be afraid of being cut.

S.TRANSL: won't be afraid of being cut.
我想要編織.
I want to weave.

S.FORM: mai tu senanisan nani mlikenengtiiku a nayau a wawayku buqaRasay.
S.PHON: mai tu sənanisan nani mrikənəŋtiiku a najau a wawajku βuqaʁasaj.
S.FORM: mai tu senanisan nani mlikenengtiiku a nayau a wawayku buqaRasay.
S.PHON: mai tu sənanisan nani mrikənəŋtiiku a najau a wawajku βuqaʁasaj.

TRANSL.notes: (可是)沒有割好的香蕉樹皮,我就休息,我就是這樣懶惰的人.

S.TRANSL: 沒有割好的香蕉樹皮,我就休息,我就是這樣懶惰的人.

TRANSL.notes: (But) I don't have the peeled banana bark, (so) I take a rest. I am this kind of lazy person.

S.TRANSL: I don't have the peeled banana bark, I take a rest. I am this kind of lazy person.

TRANSL.notes: 我認真割香蕉樹皮,(可是)我不會織布.

S.TRANSL: 我認真割香蕉樹皮, 我不會織布.

TRANSL.notes: I am earnest in barking banana trees, (but) I cannot weave.

S.TRANSL: I am earnest in barking banana trees, I cannot weave.
看不清楚,線往哪裡我不知道.
I have poor eyesight. I don't know where the lines go.
我喜歡編織.
I like weaving.

S.FORM: mai tu senanisan tu qelizen nani mlikenengtiiku zinku a.
S.PHON: mai tu sənanisan tu qəriz~rən nani mrikənəŋtiiku z~rinku a.
S.FORM: mai tu senanisan tu qelizen nani mlikenengtiiku zinku a.
S.PHON: mai tu sənanisan tu qəriz~rən nani mrikənəŋtiiku z~rinku a.

TRANSL.notes: (可是)我沒有削好的香蕉樹皮和香蕉樹皮繞成的線圈,我想我就會休息.

S.TRANSL: 我沒有削好的香蕉樹皮和香蕉樹皮繞成的線圈,我想我就會休息.

TRANSL.notes: (But) I don't have peeled banana bark and the coil of banana bark, so I will take a rest, I think.

S.TRANSL: I don't have peeled banana bark and the coil of banana bark, so I will take a rest, I think.

TRANSL.notes: 我不會織布,(因為)看不清楚.

S.TRANSL: 我不會織布, 看不清楚.

TRANSL.notes: I cannot weave, (because) I have poor eyesight.

S.TRANSL: I cannot weave, I have poor eyesight.

TRANSL.notes: (線)會歪一邊.

S.TRANSL: 會歪一邊.

TRANSL.notes: (The lines) would be lopsided.

S.TRANSL: would be lopsided.
做完了沒有?
Have you finished?

S.FORM: XXXX mul maipama mulpun dadusapama nazaupama.
XXXX mul maipama mulpun dadusapama nazaupama.
S.TRANSL: 還沒有,才完成一半,這麼長而已.
Not yet. I have finished only half of it. This long.

S.FORM: en azasanku temawaR ta taqsian nani.
S.PHON: ən az~rasanku təmawaʁ ta taqsian nani.
S.FORM: en azasanku temawaR ta taqsian nani.
S.PHON: ən az~rasanku təmawaʁ ta taqsian nani.
S.TRANSL: 我明天要帶去學校.
I will take it to school tomorrow.
這是你昨天做布的嗎?
Is this what you had for weaving yesterday?
嗯.
Yes.

S.FORM: Ray nani bulaiku tata zinku nani.
S.PHON: ʁaj nani βuraiku tata z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: Ray nani bulaiku tata zinku nani.
S.PHON: ʁaj nani βuraiku tata z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我說,給我那個.
'Give that to me,' said I.
隨便啦.
It doesn't matter.

S.FORM: anu yauti ya nitenun na tinaku anu zinnati na sunis.
S.PHON: anu jauti ja nitənun na tinaku anu z~rinnati na sunis.
S.FORM: anu yauti ya nitenun na tinaku anu zinnati na sunis.
S.PHON: anu jauti ja nitənun na tinaku anu z~rinnati na sunis.
S.TRANSL: 小孩說,我媽媽織布的做完了.
The child said, 'My mother has finished what is for weaving.'
我們要割你的.
We'll bark yours.
我很懶惰.
I am lazy.
能夠自己繞香蕉線圈和編織,比較好.
If we can coil the lines peeled off from banana bark and weave on our own, it would be better.

W.TRANSL: 綁香蕉線-處焦.祈使=完成

S.FORM: mduday tengengti unay sukaw midayan sasubuqantati.
S.PHON: mɮuɮaj təŋəŋti unaj sukaw miɮajan sasuβuqantati.
S.FORM: mduday tengengti unay sukaw midayan sasubuqantati.
S.PHON: mɮuɮaj təŋəŋti unaj sukaw miɮajan sasuβuqantati.
S.TRANSL: 沒有對齊,又黑,不好,自己用來當背包就好.
subuq就是用從香蕉樹皮割下的線所做成的背袋

W.TRANSL: 未來-香蕉編的背包-處焦-1IPL.屬格=完成

TRANSL.notes: 隨便(可以給人家)沒關係.

S.TRANSL: 隨便 沒關係.
'It doesn't matter,' said I.
不行,我們做新的才可以.
No, we had better make a new one.

S.FORM: mai tu dawad kyami ngid sanis.
S.PHON: mai tu ɮawaɮ kjami ŋiɮ sanis.
S.FORM: mai tu dawad kyami ngid sanis.
S.PHON: mai tu ɮawaɮ kjami ŋiɮ sanis.
S.TRANSL: 沒有時間削香蕉樹皮.
We don't have time to bark banana trees.

S.FORM: saqutuan a uzusa peninaan qaseminti mai qayauti.
S.PHON: saqutuan a uz~rusa pəninaan qasəminti mai qajauti.
S.FORM: saqutuan a uzusa peninaan qaseminti mai qayauti.
S.PHON: saqutuan a uz~rusa pəninaan qasəminti mai qajauti.
S.TRANSL: 半天弄兩個,就夠了,不就有了嗎?

TRANSL.notes: (We) bark two banana trees within half of a day. (We'll have) enough, won't we?

S.TRANSL: bark two banana trees within half of a day. enough, won't we?

S.FORM: anu temawaR si yauti qatiwkati sinananamkati mimali zinnaiku na sunjowta nani.
S.PHON: anu təmawaʁ si jauti qatiwkati sinananamkati mimari z~rinnaiku na sunj*wta nani.
S.FORM: anu temawaR si yauti qatiwkati sinananamkati mimali zinnaiku na sunjowta nani.
S.PHON: anu təmawaʁ si jauti qatiwkati sinananamkati mimari z~rinnaiku na sunj*wta nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們的村長說要去練習打球.
Our village head said we were going to practice playing the ball.

S.FORM: mana mai smanu ka panchangta zinku ya.
S.PHON: mana mai smanu ka panʦhaŋta z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: mana mai smanu ka panchangta zinku ya.
S.PHON: mana mai smanu ka panʦhaŋta z~rinku ja.
S.TRANSL: 為什麼我們的班長都沒說?
Why didn't our class leader tell us?
他不要我們老人家,現在都要年輕人.

TRANSL.notes: He doesn't want us elders. (He needs) youngsters now.

S.TRANSL: He doesn't want us elders. youngsters now.

W.TRANSL: 不要-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成=1IPL.主格

S.FORM: yau yau su izaanna sudadanna nanganna na nanganku nani.
S.PHON: jau jau su iz~raanna suɮaɮanna naŋanna na naŋanku nani.
S.FORM: yau yau su izaanna sudadanna nanganna na nanganku nani.
S.PHON: jau jau su iz~raanna suɮaɮanna naŋanna na naŋanku nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他(班長)有寫他的名字…我的名字.

S.TRANSL: 他 有寫他的名字…我的名字.

TRANSL.notes: He (class leader) wrote down his name .. my name.

S.TRANSL: He wrote down his name .. my name.

S.FORM: wanay XXXX mai XXXX wanay qayau a labangku yu zinku ti asin nani.
S.PHON: wanaj **** mai **** wanaj qajau a raβaŋku ju z~rinku ti asin nani.
S.FORM: wanay XXXX mai XXXX wanay qayau a labangku yu zinku ti asin nani.
S.PHON: wanaj **** mai **** wanaj qajau a raβaŋku ju z~rinku ti asin nani.
S.TRANSL: 我跟Asin講那天我有客人.

TRANSL.notes: I told Asin I had guests (on that day).

S.TRANSL: I told Asin I had guests .

S.FORM: anu yau labang tianati siliway timaisu zinnaiku.
S.PHON: anu jau raβaŋ tianati siriwaj timaisu z~rinnaiku.
S.FORM: anu yau labang tianati siliway timaisu zinnaiku.
S.PHON: anu jau raβaŋ tianati siriwaj timaisu z~rinnaiku.
S.TRANSL: 他跟我講說,你有客人的話,誰要代替你做?
'If you have guests, who will replace you?' he told me.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有我的(名字).

S.TRANSL: 沒有我的 .

TRANSL.notes: There is no mine (my name).

S.TRANSL: There is no mine .

S.FORM: maiti tu dawad ka zinkuti ya.
S.PHON: maiti tu ɮawaɮ ka z~rinkuti ja.
S.FORM: maiti tu dawad ka zinkuti ya.
S.PHON: maiti tu ɮawaɮ ka z~rinkuti ja.
S.TRANSL: 我講說我沒有時間.
'I don't have time,' said I.

TRANSL.notes: 可能沒有我的(名字).

S.TRANSL: 可能沒有我的 .

TRANSL.notes: There is no mine (my name).

S.TRANSL: There is no mine .
沒有你的名字.
There is no yours.

S.FORM: XXXX wama tiayayun na tizinay nani aiku kintuluimi ya.
S.PHON: **** wama tiajajun na tiz~rinaj nani aiku kinturuimi ja.
S.FORM: XXXX wama tiayayun na tizinay nani aiku kintuluimi ya.
S.PHON: **** wama tiajajun na tiz~rinaj nani aiku kinturuimi ja.
S.TRANSL: 只有Ayayun,Zin和我,我們三個人.
Only Ayayun, Zin, and I. We three.
有男的嗎?
Is there any man?
男生有幾個我也不知道.
I don't know how many men there are.
只有十個人,我不能去.

TRANSL.notes: Only ten people (can go). (I can't go).

S.TRANSL: Only ten people . .
對,只有十個人.
Yes, only ten.

S.FORM: XXXX yau utulu ya mlalu'ung zinna si.
S.PHON: **** jau uturu ja mraruʔuŋ z~rinna si.
S.FORM: XXXX yau utulu ya mlalu'ung zinna si.
S.PHON: **** jau uturu ja mraruʔuŋ z~rinna si.
S.TRANSL: 東興村有三個人.
There are three people from Dongxing Village.

S.FORM: nayauti mlalu'ung alapati tu mlalu'ung haw.
S.PHON: najauti mraruʔuŋ arapati tu mraruʔuŋ haw.
S.FORM: nayauti mlalu'ung alapati tu mlalu'ung haw.
S.PHON: najauti mraruʔuŋ arapati tu mraruʔuŋ haw.

TRANSL.notes: 要用東興村的人(去參加球賽).

S.TRANSL: 要用東興村的人 .

TRANSL.notes: (They) want residents from Dongxing Village.

S.TRANSL: want residents from Dongxing Village.
